g.text: — Show player vitals (food, water, suit, time)
— Show repair progress (bays available at Crash Site)
— Install repair materials to fix the ship
— Cook bio_gel (+40% food) or ice_crystal (+40% water)
— Recharge drone battery, overcharge, auto-charge toggle
— Repair suit (costs battery) or rest to recover
A pure crystalline structure harvested from the ice. Used for ship hull repairs and can be processed into water at the Kitchen
